videos.author: MTGGoldfish
videos.title: Its Time to Punish Excessive Card Draw
videos.description:
Everyone is drawing so many cards! It's time we punish them with Winter, Razorkin Needlehead, and Scrawling Trawler!

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

► Read more about this deck (full article): https://www.mtggoldfish.com/articles/single-scoop-its-time-to-punish-excessive-card-draw
► View this deck with the latest prices: https://www.mtggoldfish.com/deck/7323800#paper

videos.title: Cosmogoyf Self Destructs  Much Abrew
videos.description:
Is Cosmogoyf really a sneaky combo piece in disguise, backed by aggressive self-mill and Self-Destruct, to close out the game by surprise? Let's find out!

videos.author: MTGGoldfish
videos.title: Web-Slinging Land, Silk, Upgraded Maga and the Full Set  Daily MTG Spider-man Spoilers
videos.description:
We've reached the end of Spider-man spoiler season. Today we get a look at the last few cards from the set including a web-slinging land, a better Maga, Traitor to Mortals, a card drawing equipment and more! Let's discuss!

Need Spider-man cards? https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish
Need to see the full set? https://www.mtgpreviews.com

0:53 Silk
3:18 Urban Retreat
7:52 Biorganic Carapace
10:23 Jackal
15:04 Morlun
20:33 Marvel Sheet, Commons and Uncommons

videos.author: MTGGoldfish
videos.title: Mono Green Has Been an Underdog for Too Long
videos.description:
I never thought I'd be rooting on Mono Green in 2025 but here I am..... I guess.
